main.description: A recorded brew session — created when a user runs a timer

timer.description: AT-URI of the timer that was brewed

post.description: AT-URI of a Bluesky post associated with this brew

stepValues.description: Actual quantities entered during the brew

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the brew session started

stepValue.description: A captured value from a quantity step during a brew

stepIndex.description: Zero-based index of the step in the timer

value.description: The quantity entered by the user
